# featureExtractionTimeWindowSize

**Instance Property**

A time duration, in seconds, that determines how much audio data the feature-extraction session reads each time it samples an audio file.

## Declaration

```swift
var featureExtractionTimeWindowSize: TimeInterval { get set }
```

## Discussion

The time-window size defaults to `0.975` seconds and must be in the range `[0.5, 15.0]`.

Feature-extraction sessions that use [doc://com.apple.createml/documentation/CreateML/MLSoundClassifier/ModelParameters-swift.struct/FeatureExtractorType/vggish(revision:)] ignore this value and always use a time-window size of `0.975` seconds.

## Accessing feature extraction parameters

- **overlapFactor**: The proportion of overlap that the feature-extraction session uses to analyze two consecutive windows in the audio data.
- **featureExtractor**: The algorithm type the session uses to extract features from audio files.
